text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out with Haru Urara, we stand by the
school gates to part ways.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Aww! I don't wanna go back. I have to study for
my test if I do.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I wonder if I can get King to tutor me like
usual―

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Urara, what happenstance to run into you
here.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah, King! You're just in time! I—

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wowie! King, you look so beautiful! Do you have
something planned today?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I-I'm just going shopping! What's with the
compliments all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I mean, we literally have the same room. You've
seen all my clothing a ton of times...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's true! You always look so cool and
mature! Not to mention stylish! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wh-wha?! I-I...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I sure would love to try some of your stylish
clothes on! Then I'll look all cool and mature, too!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: F-fine. I'll pick some out for you to wear.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yay! You come too, Trainer! It's gonna be so fun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yippee! We're gonna be so stylish! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
H-hold on a minute! You want me to style two
people?! That's―

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I can't wait to see what you put together, King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, fine! I'll allow your presence! I'll show you
the shining light of my genius! Come along!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go along with Haru Urara, and we spend a
wonderful time getting styled by King Halo.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, however, Haru Urara has a lot of
cramming to catch up on...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ngh! I know, I know!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes, the upcoming test... Wh-what's that look
for? Can't you see I'm about to go shopping?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Siiiigh... And here I thought I could have a nice relaxing time browsing by myself.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Sniff... sniff... King...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I knew you would ask me to help you study again. That's why I kept telling you to study every single day!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: King?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Let's just hurry up and get this over with. I've
already put together a set of practice questions
for you.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! Kiiing! You're a lifesaver!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately the shopping has to wait, but
thanks to that, Haru Urara doesn't fail her test!
